<!-- Other solutions you've thought about -->

<!-- Describe how this feature would be used -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Any other context, mockups, or examples -->

## Priority
- [ ] High - Critical for operations
- [ ] Medium - Would improve workflow
- [ ] Low - Nice to have
